content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Remediated both pending nearby-work amendments. Nearby status verification now refreshes status-sensitive candidates independently of sparse title/description checks: all direct relations are detail-refreshed, sibling and related-work prefetching no longer discards summary-closed/deferred candidates before fetched detail can confirm status, and render filtering prefers fetched detail so stale-open closed beads are omitted while stale-closed open beads can still appear. Prompt review now treats graph-derived `## Nearby work` like protected prompt context: current prompts tell refiners to preserve it verbatim, drift validation rejects added/removed/rewritten Nearby work bodies, and legacy v1 prompts still cannot gain fabricated Nearby work during refinement. Added regression coverage for direct/sibling/related stale status handling and Nearby work prompt-review preservation.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Inspected nearby-context construction, detail fallback loading, prompt-review guidance, and canonical drift validation paths.
1. [Completed] Updated nearby detail loading and candidate filtering so `br show` detail status is consulted before status-sensitive Nearby work entries are finally included or excluded.
2. [Completed] Updated prompt-review contract guidance and drift checks so current graph-derived `## Nearby work` is preserved verbatim and legacy prompts cannot fabricate it.
3. [Completed] Added focused regression tests for stale summary/detail disagreements across direct dependencies, siblings, related work, and rewritten Nearby work prompt bodies.
4. [Completed] Ran focused and full repository validation gates, including the authoritative Nix build.

## Validation Evidence

- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub build_nearby_bead_context_keeps_summary_closed_related_work_when_detail_is_open --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub canonical_contract_drift_flags_rewritten_nearby_work_body --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` passed.
- `nix build` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
